name: Production discrepancy: Non-V1 user (13 hops on staging)
description: Non-V1 user attempting to transfer to payment gateway. Production returns maxFlow:0 while staging finds a 13-hop path. This proves V1 token filtering is NOT the cause - the issue is incomplete trust graph on production.
notes: Critical test case: hasV1=false on both prod and staging. Staging finds a complex 13-hop path. Production returns maxFlow:0. This definitively proves the issue is NOT V1 token filtering but rather incomplete trust graph loading.

stagingResult.description: Complex multi-hop path through trust network
